hypothesis: If an LLM-driven agent (MatAgent) is augmented with explicit tool use (short-term and long-term memory, periodic table, knowledge base), DiffCSP structure generation, and iComFormer property evaluation, then it will achieve higher success rates at generating compositions within ±0.25 eV/atom of target formation energies and produce more compositionally valid, unique, and novel candidates than tool-free LLM variants and MatterGen, because iterative tool-guided planning, knowledge retrieval, and feedback-driven refinement improve proposal quality.
